entries.name: Personal notebooks and working notes
entries.description: Informal records of observations, decisions, and working thoughts.
entries.typicalForm: Paper notebooks, digital notes, loose files.
entries.realisticCeiling: T02 to T03 for most content, occasionally T04a if transcribed and structured.
entries.scopeNotes: Often individual scope only, may never become institutional.
entries.accessibilityNotes: Often retained personally, accessibility highly variable.
entries.licensingNotes: Licensing rarely considered. May be inherited from institutional research outputs policies when transcribed or deposited.

entries.name: Correspondence and communications
entries.description: Emails, letters, meeting notes, chat logs.
entries.realisticCeiling: T02 to T03, rarely higher, due to privacy and selective documentation.
entries.scopeNotes: Mix of individual and institutional scope.
entries.licensingNotes: Privacy and data protection considerations typically dominate. Re-use licensing rarely meaningful as a standalone question.

entries.name: Publications and reports
entries.description: Formal outputs, both own and referenced.
entries.realisticCeiling: T06 (DOIs) routinely, T08a or T08b for open-access publications in repositories.
entries.licensingNotes: Open access publications typically carry Creative Commons licences. Traditional publications often have restrictive publisher licences that limit re-use.

entries.name: Project documentation
entries.description: Proposals, methodology documents, ethics approvals, permissions.
entries.realisticCeiling: T03 to T04b, sometimes T06 if deposited.
entries.accessibilityNotes: Often access-restricted by funder or ethics requirements.
entries.licensingNotes: Ethics and permissions documents typically have inherent re-use restrictions. Methodology documents increasingly published openly when deposited.

entries.name: Raw data files
entries.description: Direct outputs from instruments and measurements.
entries.typicalForm: Spectra, image stacks, instrument logs, binary files.
entries.realisticCeiling: T06+ achievable with appropriate repositories, T08a/T08b through domain repositories.
entries.accessibilityNotes: Volume and format may complicate access, repositories increasingly available.
entries.licensingNotes: Re-use licensing key for FAIR compliance. Domain repositories typically require explicit licensing at deposit.

entries.name: Processed data and derived products
entries.description: Calibrated, segmented, or statistically treated data.
entries.realisticCeiling: T06+ to T08a, T08b with appropriate semantic representation.
entries.accessibilityNotes: Often more accessible than raw data due to smaller size.
entries.licensingNotes: Re-use licensing key for FAIR compliance. May inherit constraints from raw data licensing.

entries.name: Images
entries.typicalForm: Image files, image stacks, IIIF presentations.
entries.realisticCeiling: T06 to T08b, IIIF infrastructure supports federation directly.
entries.accessibilityNotes: IIIF and similar standards enable broad accessibility.
entries.licensingNotes: Image licensing varies widely. Institutional images often carry restrictions related to depicted objects. IIIF supports rights statements at the image level.

entries.name: Physical samples and references
entries.realisticCeiling: T06 through IGSNs and sample registries, T08a as metadata-level federation, semantic layer through T07b/T08b.
entries.scopeNotes: Institutional scope for the physical object, international for the identifier and metadata.
entries.accessibilityNotes: Physical access always restricted, but discoverability can be global.
entries.licensingNotes: Re-use licensing applies to the metadata about the sample. Physical sample access governed by separate policies and material transfer agreements.

entries.name: Equipment and method records
entries.realisticCeiling: T04b through method standards, T06 if instruments are registered, T07b with recommended implementations.
entries.licensingNotes: Method documentation typically published openly when separated from project-specific details.

entries.name: References to objects studied
entries.description: The heritage objects the research concerns.
entries.realisticCeiling: T06 through institutional identifiers and PIDs, T08b through linked data publication.
entries.accessibilityNotes: Often the most openly accessible resource type in heritage contexts.
entries.licensingNotes: Object metadata licensing varies. Aggregators typically require open licences for object descriptions. Imagery of objects may have separate licensing.

entries.name: References to people involved
entries.realisticCeiling: T06 through ORCID, T07b/T08b through CIDOC CRM actor modelling.
entries.accessibilityNotes: ORCID adoption increasingly standard for researchers.
entries.licensingNotes: Personal data considerations dominate over re-use licensing. ORCID and similar carry their own data use policies.

entries.name: References to organisations
entries.realisticCeiling: T06 through ROR, T07b/T08b through CIDOC CRM modelling.
entries.accessibilityNotes: ROR and similar registries support easy federation.
entries.licensingNotes: ROR and similar organisation registries are openly licensed and freely usable.

entries.name: Vocabulary and terminology used
entries.typicalForm: Glossaries, term lists, ad hoc usage.
entries.realisticCeiling: T05 by definition once externalised, T08b through linked vocabularies.
entries.accessibilityNotes: Often implicit, becomes a resource when documented.
entries.licensingNotes: Local vocabularies should carry explicit licences when published. Reference to external vocabularies inherits their licensing.

entries.name: Provenance and process records
entries.description: How the work was done, in what order, with what decisions.
entries.accessibilityNotes: Often reconstructed after the fact, completeness variable.
entries.licensingNotes: Provenance records typically inherit the licensing of the resources they describe.

entries.name: Interpretive material
entries.realisticCeiling: T03 to T04b for structured interpretive material, T07b/T08b through annotation models.
entries.accessibilityNotes: Material not in formal publication often remains at lower treatment levels.
entries.licensingNotes: Interpretive material licensing rarely considered explicitly. Increasingly relevant as annotation systems publish interpretive content.

entries.name: Connections to other work
entries.realisticCeiling: T06 through DOIs and other PIDs, T08b through citation networks.
entries.licensingNotes: Citation data widely treated as openly usable. Crossref, OpenCitations and similar publish under open licences.
